title: Start-here guide: Your First Overnight Task with Ralph Workflow
summary: Published and deployed a start-here first-task guide to ralphworkflow.com/blog. The guide directly addresses the #1 conversion asset priority from ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: a concrete playbook for picking a real backlog task, writing a tight PROMPT.md spec, running Ralph Workflow tonight, and judging the result in the morning. Contains prominent Codeberg star CTA at top, in-body links to codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow, and GitHub mirror link. SEO-optimized slug targeting 'first overnight task with AI coding agent' intent. Deployed via Capistrano to production.
shared_findings_reused: adoption_metrics_latest.json: 11 Codeberg stars flat — need stronger conversion path
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: first-task guide = highest priority conversion asset
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: what is it, who for, why different, why now
expected_impact: Gives all site/blog/docs traffic a concrete 'try it tonight' next step. Turns abstract interest into real adoption. SEO-targeted for people searching how to start using AI coding agents unattended. Codeberg links in body text (not just sidebar) on every page view.
